prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile is a DIFFERENT huge towering object standing FREE on a small flat patch of dark near-black volcanic rock — the object itself rises straight up and IS the sprite. Do NOT put it on a raised block, cube, column, box, crate or pedestal, and do NOT draw the ground as a tall raised cube: just a small low patch at the base, everything else transparent. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a massive smoking fumarole tower 2) a towering black basalt column 3) a towering charred ancient tree 4) a towering lava-rock pillar 5) a massive dark monolith with glowing seams 6) a colossal jagged obsidian blade 7) a colossal cluster of basalt organ pipes 8) a ruined black fortress tower 9) a grand dark obsidian obelisk 10) a giant volcanic chimney venting smoke. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
